items.title: O'Neill eyes 'couple of new faces' for Celtic
items.summary: Martin O'Neill insists Celtic are "making some progress" in introducing more new faces to his squad as he opens up on the failure to re-sign Kelechi Iheanacho and Marcelo Saracchi.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Rowles 201 crushes England U19s before Basson wreaks havoc
items.summary: England stutter to 144 for 5 in reply to 460 at end of second day in Hove
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
